Metadata.title: WIG Tracker
Metadata.description: Focus on your most important goals.

Dashboard.teamWeeklyScoreboardDesc: Lead measure achievement for all team members this week.
Dashboard.noWorkspaceDesc: To view the team dashboard, you must join a workspace first.
Dashboard.noScoreboardDesc: Create a scoreboard to track your goals.
Dashboard.weekViewDesc: Shows the week (Mon-Sun) containing the selected date.
Dashboard.monthViewDesc: Aggregates the entire month containing the selected date.
Dashboard.weeklyLeadMeasuresDesc: Weekly goals ({count}) are tracked for this week, and monthly goals ({monthlyCount}) are tracked as month-to-date.
Dashboard.historyLimitMessage: Data older than 6 months is restricted.
Dashboard.monthlyBoardDesc: View all records for the selected month by week.
Dashboard.noMonthlyMeasures: No monthly lead measures for this month.

Scoreboard.onlyOneActiveDesc: Only one scoreboard can be active at a time.
Scoreboard.archivedScoreboardsDesc: View your past scoreboards and reactivate them if needed.
Scoreboard.noActiveDesc: Reactivate an archived scoreboard or create a new one.
Scoreboard.confirmArchive: Do you want to archive the current active scoreboard?
Scoreboard.noWorkspaceArchiveDesc: The scoreboard archive is available after joining a workspace.
Scoreboard.archiveDesc: View all your scoreboards and manage active/archived status.

Setup.description: Set one goal (WIG), its success metric (lag measure), and key actions (lead measures).
Setup.archiveDesc: End the current goal and save it as an execution record.
Setup.confirmArchive: Do you want to archive this scoreboard?
Setup.goalQuestion: What is your most important goal?
Setup.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Complete a 5km run in 8 weeks
Setup.lagMeasureQuestion: How will you measure success? (X → Y)
Setup.lagTip1Text: Are the start (X) and target (Y) points clear?
Setup.lagTip2Text: Does it represent final goal achievement?
Setup.leadMeasureQuestion: What actions will you take each week for success?
Setup.leadMeasurePlaceholder: e.g., Run 4 times a week for 30 min
Setup.leadTip1Text: Does this action improve the lag measure?
Setup.leadTip2Text: Is it an action you can directly control?
Setup.deleteTagConfirm: Do you want to delete this tag?
Setup.tagLimit: You can add up to {n} tags for classification.
Setup.newTagPlaceholder: Add tag (e.g., Morning routine, max {n} chars)
Setup.deleteTagConfirmExtended: Do you want to delete this tag? It will be removed from all associated measures.

Coachmark.goalContent: A good WIG is about choosing 'what is most important'. Too many goals results in lack of focus. Set only one for this period.
Coachmark.lagContent: A lag measure shows the final result. Write a metric measuring WIG achievement in the form 'X to Y by date'.
Coachmark.leadContent: Lead measures are predictive actions that change the result. They must be influenceable. Write daily/weekly recurring actions.
Coachmark.tagsContent: Create and attach tags here to categorize similar actions. These tags will also be shown on your dashboard.

Toast.tagLimitReached: You can only select up to {n} tags.
Toast.tagNameTooLong: Tag name must be {n} characters or less.
Toast.fillRequiredFields: Please enter a WIG, lag measure, and at least one lead measure.
Toast.archiveSuccess: Scoreboard archived. You can now create a new one.
Toast.duplicatedTag: A tag with the same name already exists.

ProfilePassword.cardDesc: Check your current password and change it to a new one.
ProfilePassword.newPasswordHint: 8+ characters with English, numbers, and allowed special characters.

ProfileDeleteAccount.cardDesc: Check your current password and delete all associated data.
ProfileDeleteAccount.warningText: Account data cannot be recovered after deletion. You cannot delete your account if you are the last admin of a workspace.

ProfileMembers.invitesCardDesc: Invite members via the invite code management page.
ProfileMembers.currentMembersDesc: Admins can remove members and transfer admin privileges to others.
ProfileMembers.noWorkspaceDesc: Member management is available after creating a workspace.
ProfileMembers.noAccessDesc: Only workspace admins can manage members and invites.

ProfileInvites.newInviteDesc: Set the maximum number of uses and issue an invite code.
ProfileInvites.maxUsesLimit: Up to 999 uses can be set
ProfileInvites.inviteListDesc: Copy codes and manage active/inactive status.
ProfileInvites.noWorkspaceDesc: Invite management is available after creating a workspace.
ProfileInvites.noAccessDesc: Only workspace admins can create or toggle invite status.
ProfileInvites.statusChangeFailed: Failed to change invite code status.

Profile.nicknameChangeDesc: Change the name displayed on the dashboard.
Profile.languageDesc: Change the display language of the app.
Profile.logoutDesc: End the session on the current device.
Profile.deleteAccountDesc: Delete account and all associated data.
Profile.changeWorkspaceNameDesc: Change the workspace name to match your current operations.
Profile.workspaceInviteDesc: Generate an invite code to bring in new team members.
Profile.workspaceDeleteDesc: Delete the workspace and all associated data (irreversible).
Profile.pwaInstallDesc: Add to home screen to use it like a native app.
Profile.installGuideDesc: Check how to add to home screen for each browser.
Profile.personalReminderDesc: Set up personalized reminders to ensure you never miss a log.
Profile.manageMembersDesc: View and manage workspace member access.
Profile.manageInvitesDesc: Create and manage invite codes for your workspace.
Profile.workspaceDeleteDescFull: Deletes all data including members, scoreboards, and logs.
Profile.workspaceLeaveDescFull: Leaves the workspace and returns to the home screen.
Profile.csvDownloadDesc: Save your records as CSV by selecting period and metrics.
Profile.newFeaturesDesc: Check out recently added or improved features.
Profile.installGuideIosDesc: Step-by-step guide to add to home screen via Safari.
Profile.pushReminderDesc: Receive push notifications at a set time each day.
Profile.confirmDeleteWorkspace: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete the workspace?
Profile.confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove {nickname} from the workspace?
Profile.profileLoadFailedDashboard: Failed to load profile information. Redirecting to home.
Profile.promptWorkspaceDeleteConfirm:
To confirm deletion, please type the workspace name:
{name}
Profile.confirmDeleteWorkspaceWarning: Deleting the workspace will remove all members, scoreboards, lead measures, and logs. Do you want to continue?

Coachmark.personalReminderContent: Turn on push notifications and pick a time here to receive reminders at your preferred time each day.

ProductUpdates.latestDesc: Quickly browse what's new and try them out.

2026-04-14-personal-reminder-schedule.title: Customize your personal record reminder time
2026-04-14-personal-reminder-schedule.summary: You can now receive daily record reminder push notifications at a time that fits your lifestyle from the profile notification settings.

2026-04-14-lead-measure-tags.title: Organize lead measures more systematically with tags
2026-04-14-lead-measure-tags.summary: Create tags in the settings and attach them to lead measures to easily distinguish behavior categories on your dashboard.

2026-03-25-team-dashboard-memos.title: Leave meeting memos directly on the team dashboard
2026-03-25-team-dashboard-memos.summary: You can now write down and check memos or action items next to each team member's weekly scoreboard during WIG meetings.

2026-03-22-team-dashboard-me-highlight.title: Find your card faster on the team dashboard
2026-03-22-team-dashboard-me-highlight.summary: Your card is now sorted at the top of the team member list and clearly distinguished with a border and 'Me' badge.

2026-03-18-dashboard-export.title: Download your records as CSV
2026-03-18-dashboard-export.summary: When you need to review or share, you can pick a period and lead measures to save them immediately.

2026-03-16-dashboard-period-navigation.title: View past weekly and monthly records more easily
2026-03-16-dashboard-period-navigation.summary: You can now navigate between weekly and monthly views to check trends based on any date you want.

ApiError.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to access this resource.
ApiError.TEST_ACCOUNT_WRITE_RESTRICTED: Test accounts are restricted to tracking recordings and profile icon changes.
ApiError.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
ApiError.INTERNAL_ERROR: Server error. Please try again later.
ApiError.SESSION_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please log in again.
ApiError.LAST_ADMIN_ACCOUNT_DELETION_FORBIDDEN: The only admin cannot delete their account. Transfer ownership or delete the workspace first.
ApiError.EXPIRED_INVITE_CODE: Invite code has expired. Request a new one from the admin.
ApiError.INVITE_CODE_USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED: Invite code limit reached. Request a new one from the admin.
ApiError.CUSTOM_ID_ALREADY_EXISTS: This ID is already in use.
ApiError.ALREADY_IN_WORKSPACE: You are already in a workspace.
ApiError.WORKSPACE_MEMBER_LIMIT_REACHED: Cannot join the workspace. Contact the admin.
ApiError.STANDARD_PLAN_REQUIRED: This feature requires a STANDARD plan.
ApiError.WORKSPACE_TAG_ALREADY_EXISTS: A tag with the same name already exists.
ApiError.ADMIN_TRANSFER_REQUIRED: Admins can only delete their account after transferring ownership or deleting the workspace.
ApiError.LEAD_MEASURE_ARCHIVED: Cannot add logs to archived lead measures.
ApiError.FUTURE_DATE_NOT_ALLOWED: Cannot record data for future dates.
ApiError.PAST_WEEK_LOG_EDIT_NOT_ALLOWED: Logs from before last week cannot be modified. Please update current week data only.
ApiError.FREE_PLAN_HISTORY_LIMIT_REACHED: Free plan users can view up to 6 months of history. Upgrade to STANDARD to view older data.
